criteria.name: PCA Method
criteria.evidence: No change to redundancy.py since last review (bbfc212). Previously verified: pca_station_loadings uses sklearn.decomposition.PCA on z-scored station matrix. Still correct.

criteria.name: Clustering Method
criteria.evidence: No change to redundancy.py since last review. Previously verified: cluster_station_order uses AgglomerativeClustering with correlation distance. Behavioral test (intra < inter-cluster) still passes.

criteria.name: Stanhope Benchmark
criteria.evidence: No change since last review. Previously verified: benchmark_to_stanhope produces per-station overlap, mean_abs_diff, correlation against Stanhope reference.

criteria.name: Recommendation Synthesis
criteria.evidence: No change since last review. Previously verified: build_station_recommendations accepts pca_loadings and cluster_order, synthesizes all four analytical methods.

criteria.name: Test Quality (Redundancy)
criteria.evidence: All 8 redundancy tests pass. No test changes since last review. _sample_frame() docstring present.

criteria.name: Probabilistic Method
criteria.evidence: No change to uncertainty.py since last review. Previously verified: _distribution_samples uses scipy.stats.gaussian_kde, produces 256-sample distribution.

criteria.name: Station-Removal Risk
criteria.evidence: No change since last review. Previously verified: quantify_station_removal_risk produces per-station risk_probability, ci_lower, ci_upper, risk_band.

criteria.name: Confidence Intervals
criteria.evidence: No change since last review. Previously verified: KDE samples normalized to [0,1] by dividing by empirical upper bound. All 3 interval tests pass.

criteria.name: Assumptions and Limitations
criteria.evidence: No change since last review. _limitations flags stations with overlap_count < 24. assumptions string documents KDE method.

criteria.name: Integration with Recommendations
criteria.evidence: No change since last review. Previously verified: build_station_recommendations merges uncertainty output via inner join.

criteria.name: Test Quality (Uncertainty)
criteria.evidence: All 8 uncertainty tests pass. No test changes since last review. Behavioral verification of KDE output shape and CI properties.

summary: PASS. The 3 commits since last review (7090029, bba7ec0, e0a96e6) contain only infrastructure changes: an UnRalph PASS commit, an orchestrator sync commit, and a fix to scripts/sync_state.py that adds 'pending' to the phase-advance search tuple alongside 'not_started'. No source code or test code was modified. All 11 acceptance criteria remain satisfied (verified by running tests). Note: test_repo_shape.py::test_repo_root_shape_is_whitelisted fails due to untracked working-tree artifacts (.cartography/, codemap.md, garbled filename), but this is a pre-existing working-tree hygiene issue unrelated to the committed changes and not a phase exit criterion.
